name: hakimi-advantage-finder
description: 哈基米优势发现器 — Gallup-based career strengths chat app

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
